hero.title: LuxDrape Trade Program
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of interior designers, decorators, and contractors who trust LuxDrape for premium custom window treatments. Exclusive pricing, dedicated support, and priority service.

benefits.title: Exclusive Trade Discount
benefits.description: Save up to 25% on all custom curtains and shades with your trade account.

benefits.title: Free Shipping
benefits.description: Complimentary shipping on all orders, no minimum required.

benefits.title: Priority Production
benefits.description: Skip the queue with expedited 7-day production for trade members.

benefits.title: Dedicated Support
benefits.description: Access to our trade specialists for measurements and consultations.

testimonials.quote: LuxDrape has transformed how I source window treatments for my clients. The quality is exceptional and the trade pricing makes it profitable for my business.
testimonials.author: Sarah Mitchell

testimonials.quote: The dedicated support team helped me with complex measurements for a high-rise project. Their expertise saved me time and ensured perfect fit.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: My clients love the custom options and quick turnaround. I've used LuxDrape for over 50 projects and have never been disappointed.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Walsh

faqTeaser.title: Questions?
faqTeaser.subtitle: Our trade team is here to help. Reach out for personalized assistance with your application or any questions about the program.
